posts.author: norma0485 (Norma)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I am testing DocuGen to streamline my process. I have successfully created some files using this platform. However, I have not been able to set up the click me button yet (Integration recipe). I am following this tutorial (1540) Get Started on DocuGen in 6 Minutes - YouTube, but the recipe is not loading to be set it up. I I have waited more than 10 min and the integration recipe is not loading. Is there another way to achieve this task?

image2434×1411 48.3 KB

Thanks for your help.
Norma Osorio

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @norma0485

Can’t say we’re having any issues with the integration in our account.
I would recommend (if all your other pages/systems are loading correctly and you’ve tried refresh/restart etc.) that you reach out to the developer for support.

They should be able to assist

Peta | Upstream Tech
peta@upstreamtech.io
+613 9067 5611
Chat with Peta

posts.author: norma0485 (Norma)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
Thanks for your response. I tried adding click me button in another board and it worked. I wonder if my board is too big to handle that integration.

I will keep trying or find another way to generate the report I want.

Norma Osorio

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: There was an issue with monday.com yesterday with integrations that use a certain type of authentication (like this). I would try again now that its resolved

posts.author: norma0485 (Norma)
posts.cookedHtml: It worked! Seems like the issue has been resolved. Thanks for you reply.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: We are glad that is the case @norma0485 ! Let us know if you need anything!
